title: astragalus tegulensis
intro: Astragalus tegulensis, also known as the Chinese milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus tegulensis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and protect against infections. Astragalus tegulensis can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
